title: IDIA Delhi Chapter to host 3 part webinar series: Do Law School Right
description: The IDIA Delhi Chapter is organising 'Do Law School Right', a 3-part online webinar series from April 20-22, 2026 designed to help incoming law students start their law school journey with clarity and confidence. Law school often comes with a steep learning curve, and many students spend months figuring things out on their own. This series aims to give you a head start before you even step onto campus by covering what law school really looks like, the skills you should start building early, and
